name: Stir-Fried Hamsteak and Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Unsalted, fat-skimmed beef broth or water
1 pound Fresh asparagus, diagonally sliced into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a large non-stick skillet.
2. Add hamsteak; brown on both sides over moderate heat.
3. Transfer the hamsteak to a cutting board.
4. In the same skillet, combine beef broth (or water), asparagus, garlic, and ginger.
5. Simmer uncovered until the asparagus is tender-crunchy, about 3-5 minutes depending on thickness.
6. Slice the hamsteak very thinly.
7. Blend cornstarch with wine and soy sauce to make a paste; stir into the skillet.
8. Continue cooking until the sauce simmers and thickens.
9. Stir in the ham slices and heat through.
